title: [Skyship, Exterior]
description: The path rises slightly toward a flat, square-shaped platform encased by a glaesine dome fused to the ship.  The pervasive shriek of wind along the ship's exterior is lessened in the area.  On the platform's far side, a metal viewing glass marked with chalked-on white runes points through a hole in the dome toward the distant, inky horizon, its base fused to twin metal poles extending from the deck.
